title: Craft An Elytra
description: Datapack That Add The Possibility To Craft Elytras
body:
I made Elytra craftable in this datapack.

![Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3a7dd39790e4695b4f61224ba382f65c5e6ef0a.png)

I tried to make it have sense, so the phantom membranes repair elytras so it makes sense, feathers because chickens kinnnnnda fly... string to keep together and dragon breath to.. give it the power maybe?? I don't know XD
